title: Emerald Bow
description: Transform your standard wooden bow into a legendary weapon of jade! This resource pack replaces the vanilla bow with a sleek, high-quality Emerald Bow design.
body:
Give your Minecraft archery a royal upgrade! The Emerald Bow resource pack replaces the default, boring wooden bow texture with a vibrant, gem-encrusted design. Whether you're a fan of green aesthetics or just want your gear to look more expensive, this pack is for you.

Custom 16x Pixel Art: Carefully crafted to fit the vanilla Minecraft style while looking much sharper.

Unique Draw Animations: All three stages of the bow being pulled are fully textured to match the Emerald theme.
